title: frumentum arenarium
intro: Frumentum arenarium, also known as beach sandwort or sea sandwort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae and is commonly found in coastal areas and sandy beaches. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of frumentum arenarium include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Frumentum arenarium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
